style_effects: Constant blue-white static sparks drift upward like electric fireflies, colliding and dissolving into tiny arcs; a crackling electromagnetic field distorts the air around its body with shimmering, translucent waves, pulsing rhythmically from its glowing cyan eyes and tail. The aura radiates a vibrant electric-blue intensity, casting sharp, dynamic highlights on its form with a cool, high-energy luminescence. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
